title: 5 Tests: God or Anxiety?
hook: Is that God speaking—or just anxiety?
script: Is that God speaking—or just anxiety? Here are five tests in one minute. The Shepherd Test: does this sound like Jesus, who leads, not panics? John 10:27. The Scripture Test: God never contradicts His Word. 2 Timothy 3:16. The Fruit and Peace Test: wisdom from above is pure, gentle, peaceable; let Christ's peace rule. James 3:17; Colossians 3:15. The Community Test: seek wise counsel. Proverbs 11:14. The Time Test: truth endures; wait if unsure. Habakkuk 2:3. Quick practice: pause and write it, find a verse, text a mature friend, wait 24 hours unless it's clear obedience. God isn't hurried. Save this for the next swirl.

title: Anxiety or the Shepherd's Voice?
hook: If God feels silent right now, watch this before deciding.
script: If God feels silent right now, watch this before deciding. Intrusive thoughts are loud, urgent, and shaming. God's voice is steady, gentle, and aligned with Scripture. John 10:27. Check it: Does it make you more like Jesus or more afraid? James 3:17. Are you cherry-picking verses to confirm what you already want? That's confirmation bias; let the whole counsel of God speak. 2 Timothy 3:16. Text a wise friend to sanity-check. Proverbs 11:14. Then give it time; truth doesn't expire. Habakkuk 2:3. Breathe. If peace returns as you obey the Word, keep going. Save this for the next spiral.

title: 60-Second Discernment Checklist
script: You may be overthinking this. Put the thought on the stand for a 60-second verdict. First, character: would Jesus say this? John 10:27. Second, Scripture: does the Bible affirm it or correct it? 2 Timothy 3:16. Third, fruit: does it lead to purity and peace? James 3:17; Colossians 3:15. Fourth, community: do mature believers nod yes? Proverbs 11:14. Fifth, time: if it's God, it will stand tomorrow. Habakkuk 2:3. Psychology tip: intrusive fears demand urgency; values-led actions take the next faithful step. Write it down, pray, send a text, wait 24 hours unless it's clear obedience.
